svg.text: Hydra: Tiered Big Integer Runtime for Modern C++

g.text: inline fixed limbs (up to 4 x uint64_t)
zero steady-state allocation in chained ops
and normalize back down when upper limbs are zero
add_limbs writes directly into LargeRep buffer, ascending order prevents aliasing issues
and collapsed a major large-add allocation cliff
Near-native small path with full tiered promotion
Competitive large arithmetic with zero-alloc chained ops

svg.text: "Pay for complexity only when the value actually needs it."
